title: Complex x Complex
titleNative: こんぷれっくす×コンプレックス
synopsis: The story follows the protagonist girl Yui Kotani, a second-year junior high school student who is obsessed with men's underarm hair, and the relationship with her male classmate Masato Takeo who has the thickest underarm hair in the class.

title: Wagamama☆Fairy Mirumo de Pon! Wonderful
titleNative: わがまま☆フェアリー ミルモでポン! わんだほう
synonyms: Wagamama Fairy Mirumo de Pon! Wonderful
synopsis: One day, Kaede and Milmo met a strange creature. It was not a human or a fairly, but it was Tacos, an octopus-type robot. He said, I'm looking for the seven crystals dispersed in human and fairly worlds. I've been looking for them all over the world, and I finally found they were around here. But I got tired... Will you help me search for them? This is between us, but if you collect all the seven crystals, they will grant you any wish. Because it was too absurd, they wouldn't listen to him. But he was eagerly to ask them, and Kaede and Milmo decided to look for the crystals for him. Tacos turned her fairly call into a fairly call crystal in return. Fairly call crystal has a function to detect a crystal, and it can cast a session magic by combining their forces. What is the real purpose of Tacos? What is the true role of the crystal?

title: Anisava
synopsis: Welcome to the concrete jungle, where it’s a struggle to survive among the animals of the city. Watch Jake the bear, Jenny the cat and their cast of slightly crazy friends as they live, love and try to stay sane in a wild world. (Source: Official website)

title: Kindan Joshi
synopsis: Hanako, who works for a small publishing company, has a slight communication disorder. Especially forbidden men and women who have never been in love with men. Still, Hanako was having a fulfilling life every day. Because she falls in love in her head! Hanako falls in delusional love with the man she meets somewhere today! (Source: Official Website)

title: Mao Yao De You Huo
synonyms: The Temptation of a Cat Demon
synopsis: A cat demon with a split personality is reincarnated with the memories of her past life. She wishes revenge on her past lover, but upon meeting him finds herself falling all over for him again. What should she do?! A female main character with no sense of moral principles, between an arrogant, abstinent man and the charming, indifferent demon king, who will she choose!

title: Palette: Shikisai no Shoujo
synopsis: Animated graduation work by Hirota Hirata. There was no "color" in the boy's world. One day the boy finds an old palette in a closet. When the palette opened, a little girl with colored eyes appeared from inside. The things she touched were magically colored one after another, and the boy, fascinated by the "colors" reflected in the black and white world, ran after the girl. "Show me the color, you just have to do it again." (Source: Video description, translated)

title: Chong Qi Chengyin: Lu Shao de Xinjian Chong
titleRomaji: Chong Qi Chengyin: Lu Shao de Xinjian Chong
titleNative: 宠妻成瘾：陆少的心尖宠
synopsis: Her vicious stepmother and manipulative sister never give her a moment's peace. After saving her from a desperate situation, the most powerful man in the city nicknamed The Living Devil falls for her and is determined to marry her. His name alone is enough to make her family and her scumbag ex-boyfriend fidget. Meanwhile, her love with the hero is growing deeper. (Source: MoboReader Youtube Channel)

title: Kirari Kagayaku
synopsis: Tekken is the tourism ambassador for Omachi in the Nagano Prefecture. It is his home town. The short is a story based on men's and women's romance set within the city and features the Shinano-Omachi Station, the Omachi hot springs village, the Omachi Mountain Museum, etc. Tekken stated to Oricon News that it took him 3 months to write the story. The film contains 2381 hand drawn pages.

titleRomaji: TWO ON THE ROAD: Itsumo Futari de
titleNative: TWO ON THE ROAD「いつもふたりで」
synopsis: Two anthology releases of 13 short stories, based on originals by Seizo Watase. As with other adaptations of Watase's work, they are set to music-stories here include: Ashes of Love, White Fish/Blue Fish, Dance on the Sands, Glider, Handbag Mirror, Blue Snow, Living in the World, etc. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Growth Factor
titleRomaji: Dappi Suru Tame ni Hitsuyou na Koto: Growth Factor
titleNative: だっぴするためにひつようなこと
synopsis: A middle school boy, who likes to snap photos of things he fancies, and then draws pictures of them. On his usual route home, he spots the girl he likes with another boy. The balance between his delusions and reality is in constant flux. Graduate Work 2014 by Ryosuke Oshiro, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Denpa
tags.description: Works that feature themes of social dissociation, delusions, and other issues like suicide, bullying, self-isolation, paranoia, and technological necessity in daily lives. Classic iconography: telephone poles, rooftops, and trains.

title: Elise's Karute
synopsis: Elise's Karute is a mini-character animation where Elise shares useful health information for daily life.

title: Zhui Xu 2nd Season
synopsis: In the eighth year of Jinghan, the neighboring countries in the north of the Wu Dynasty were at war, and the south was temporarily at peace. When Ning Yi and Su Tan'er came to Lin'an City to do business, they suddenly encountered a dragon turning over. The bandit Thirteenth Army took advantage of the situation to capture Lin'an, causing the couple to be separated. The captured Ning Yi met the Thirteenth Army leaders Liu Xigua, Chen Fan and others one after another. They cherished each other and were both enemies and friends. In the midst of the disputes between the family and the country, the great Confucianists defended the way, heroes rose up, and the world changed...

synopsis: This special is about a wounded man who finds himself caught up in the lives of twin sisters, and the man that they both fell in love with. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Tou Xing Jiuyue Tian
synopsis: It's a journey filled with love and dreams. When girl next door Jiu Yue is revealed to be a notorious thief, a series of mysterious events surrounding the ancient Silan Kingdom start to occur. Love and friendship, justice and evil, power and forgiveness. How should our heroine choose her journey?

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: The Girl Who Stole Time
synopsis: Qian Xiao, a cheerful girl from a fishing village, dreams of becoming an actress in the big city. On her way towards the metropolis, a sudden crash changes everything. Fortunately, she survives—and as a bonus, she obtains the Time Dial, a mysterious pendant which gives her the ability to control time. As she excitedly experiments with her newfound power, Qian Xiao becomes the target of a criminal cabal. Seventeen, an assassin from that group, enters her life. What adventure will unfold when a cold-faced, obsessive-compulsive killer and a carefree village girl cross paths? (Source: Fantasia Festival)

tags.name: Time Manipulation

title: Yuuwaku Office LOVER 2
synopsis: A young woman who works as a CM director at an advertising agency is removed from her dream project at the whim of a capricious new company president whom she has never met. Determined not to let this set-back bring her down, she undergoes a "Cinderella"-style makeover and meets a handsome man at a company party, only to learn that he is the president that demoted her... (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Vertical Video
